subcodes.first_line: O esteemed Siyyid Asadullah! If you knew to what degree 'Abdu'l-Bahá is occupied, you would surely be astonished [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا سید اسدالله اگر بدانی مشغولیت عبدالبهاء بچه درجه است البته حیران
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @methods of teaching the Cause
